parameters.description: Relay messages to your own Amazon Chime through the UnitySVC gateway. POST a native chime payload; the gateway composes the upstream URL from your stored secrets and forwards it. The free byok channel uses your own stored credentials; the plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.
parameters.plus_base_url: ${ customer_secrets.CHIME_BASE ?? https://hooks.chime.aws }/incomingwebhooks/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_id_secret }} }?token=${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's chime token

webhook_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's chime webhook id
